title: fraxinus reflexiflora
intro: Fraxinus reflexiflora, also known as the Manchurian ash or Chinese ash, is a deciduous tree native to East Asia and is part of the olive family (Oleaceae). The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fraxinus reflexiflora include reducing fever, relieving pain and soreness, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Fraxinus reflexiflora is often prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine preparations.
